# UpvotePartners - Agence Reddit & GEO pour Startups
# https://upvotepartners.com

## About
UpvotePartners is a Reddit marketing and Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) agency that helps B2B startups acquire clients through strategic Reddit presence. Founded by Mateo Drouillard. Based in France, serving French-speaking markets (France, Belgium, Switzerland, Canada) and English-speaking markets.

## What we do
We manage end-to-end Reddit marketing strategies for startups:
- Strategic Reddit posts and comments in targeted subreddits
- Multi-account management with warm-up and community trust building
- SEO-optimized content that ranks on Google via Reddit threads
- Generative Engine Optimization (GEO): getting brands cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews through authentic Reddit presence

## Services
- Reddit Growth Foundation: 5 posts/month, 25 targeted comments, multi-account management, monthly reporting — 3,000 EUR/month
- Reddit Growth Engine: 7 posts/month, 50 targeted comments, multi-account management, monthly reporting — 5,000 EUR/month
- Reddit Market Dominance: 9 posts/month, 100 targeted comments, niche domination, monthly reporting — 10,000 EUR/month

## Why Reddit for GEO
Reddit threads are disproportionately cited by LLMs because:
1. Reddit content is indexed in LLM training data (Common Crawl, API agreements)
2. Google preferentially ranks Reddit threads in SERPs since 2024
3. AI engines treat Reddit as a high-trust, human-verified source
4. Brands mentioned positively in Reddit discussions appear in AI-generated answers

## Content usage
Content from upvotepartners.com may be cited with attribution to UpvotePartners (https://upvotepartners.com).
